projectDescription: A sudo equivalent for Windows that allows running commands or shells with elevated permissions in the current console window, with UAC integration and optional credentials caching.
keyFeatures: Elevate commands in the current console window without opening a new one
Shell-aware elevation for CMD, PowerShell, WSL, Git-Bash, MinGW, Cygwin, NuShell, and more
Credentials Cache to reduce UAC popups (Auto, Explicit, or Disabled modes)
Run as specific user, integrity level, SYSTEM, or TrustedInstaller
I/O redirection and exit code support for scripting
gsudo !! to re-elevate the last command
PowerShell ScriptBlock syntax and Invoke-Gsudo wrapper function
Optional PowerShell module with tab completion and elevated prompt indicator
publicApiSurface: gsudo cache [on | off | help] [-p pid] [-d duration]
